span.p: Component View: Browser Memory Daemon - Chrome MV3 Extension

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
The Windows Chrome runtime
that loads web pages, hosts
the MV3 extension, runs the
local UI in a tab, and
exposes Chrome extension
APIs.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Sends captures and inline
blobs to

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Enqueues, drains,
checkpoints, retries, and
recovers capture/lifecycle
work through

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Reads and writes sequenced
capture/lifecycle rows and
migration metadata in

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Persists typed configuration,
lifecycle tab state,
aggregate telemetry, and
one-version queue fallback in

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Delivers /capture,
/visit-events, media
metadata, and raw blobs to

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Updates pause, policy, token,
and controls through

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Checks health and triggers
forget/policy actions on

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Declares MV3 permissions,
host permissions, service
worker, popup, and options
entrypoints.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Traverses visible DOM text
and discovers image/video
references while applying the
selected policy mode.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Schedules initial, delayed,
and SPA captures; tracks
scroll; sends capture and
inline blob upload messages
to the service worker.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Orchestrates daemon
transport, bearer token use,
stable observation/navigation
identity, lifecycle state,
outbox and media drains,
alarms, and CDP recorder
integration.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Persists capture and
lifecycle messages as
independently sequenced
IndexedDB rows with atomic
enqueue/claim/checkpoint/ack/retry,
stale-claim recovery, legacy
queue import, item admission
limits, and serialized-byte
accounting.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Lets the operator view
status, pause/resume capture,
select policy mode, and
trigger local controls from
the extension.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Browser-side IndexedDB
storage for transactional
capture/lifecycle outbox rows
plus specialized durable
media tasks/blobs;
chrome.storage.local retains
typed configuration,
lifecycle tab state,
aggregate telemetry, and
one-version queue fallback
only.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Authenticated loopback HTTP
API that handles capture,
visit events, media artifact
upload/fetch/purge, exact
search,
recent/timeline/detail,
policy rules, doctor, durable
forget, and static UI
serving.
